first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are nearly identical in substance. Both give the same score (5/10) and raise the exact same three concerns: the candidate is overqualified, lacks recent Java-specific experience, and has basic German skills. The strengths are also paraphrases of each other. The slight differences in wording, such as the variant adding that being overqualified might lead to 'dissatisfaction or short tenure', represent minor run-to-run noise and stylistic variation rather than a substantive change in the assessment of the candidate.
